research_list.name: Riyadh Air
research_list.market_position: State-owned, AI-native startup airline designed as a central pillar of Saudi Vision 2030, leveraging a greenfield IT approach with IBM.
research_list.future_outlook: Poised to become a global aviation leader with a highly efficient, data-driven operation targeting over 100 destinations by 2030.
research_list.investment_potential: Not currently publicly traded; serves as a strategic national infrastructure investment with high-growth implications for the regional travel tech sector.

research_list.name: Seera Group (Almosafer)
research_list.market_position: Dominant leader in the Saudi Arabian OTA (Online Travel Agency) market with a significant footprint in car rentals (Lumi) and travel services.
research_list.future_outlook: Strong growth potential driven by the ongoing boom in Saudi domestic and inbound tourism; focusing on cost optimization and high-margin segments.
research_list.investment_potential: Publicly traded (SEERA: Tadawul); presents a direct, scalable investment opportunity into the growing Saudi travel and hospitality ecosystem.
